SEC Drops Long-Running Lawsuit Against Ripple Labs | YES | HIGH confidence**  
The SEC's decision to drop its lawsuit against Ripple has been confirmed as resolved in April 2026, removing a major regulatory overhang and driving XRP's ~10% weekly price surge to ~$1.42 after breaking $1.50 resistance[1][7]. signals.headline: XRP ETF Approvals Enter Final Stage | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
XRP ETF Approvals Enter Final Stage | YES | MED confidence**  
XRP ETF inflows and approvals in final phase confirmed amid institutional wave, amplifying April momentum with RLUSD rollout and SEC finality[3]. This positions XRP for altcoin rotation, historically strong in April (avg. 24.8% returns since 2014)[1].

signals.headline: Ripple USD (RLUSD) Stablecoin Officially Rolls Out on XRP Ledger and Ethereum | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
Ripple USD (RLUSD) Stablecoin Officially Rolls Out on XRP Ledger and Ethereum | YES | MED confidence**  
Full-scale RLUSD launch reported as of April 19, 2026, fueling record XRPL transaction volumes and institutional adoption alongside XRP ETF approvals nearing final stages[3]. Combined with SEC resolution, this enhances XRP's cross-border payment utility, supporting predictions toward $5[3].
